title: Cobblemon Interface [Cold Sweat]
description: Cold Sweat GUI in Cobblemon Interface style.
body:
This resource pack changes the default interface of the [Cold Sweat](https://modrinth.com/mod/cold-sweat) mod, giving it style and atmosphere Cobblemon Interface.

🎨 All original ideas and visual style of Cobblemon Interface belong to [VinnyStalck](https://modrinth.com/user/VinnyStalck).

🌡️ Mod Cold Sweat created by [Mikul](https://modrinth.com/user/Mikul).

### Important

Support for this resource pack will cease if [Cobblemon Interface Modded](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-interface-modded) starts supporting the Berry Pouch mod.
